title: Romantic Warriors II: A Progressive Music Saga About Rock in Opposition
original_title: Romantic Warriors II: A Progressive Music Saga About Rock in Opposition
overview: Romantic Warriors II explores the origins of the Rock in Opposition movement in the late 70s, and how it continues to influence contemporary bands throughout the world. Featured bands include Henry Cow, Art Zoyd, Magma, Univers Zero, Magma, Thinking Plague, Etron Fou Leloublan and Samla Mammas Manna.
